name: American Loans
description_short: Advance America offers installment loans up to $1,820 with same-day funding at physical locations and online in Oklahoma City. Fast approval for borrowers needing emergency cash.
description_long:
Advance America is a nationally recognized, fully accredited financial services company operating physical storefronts across the United States, including Oklahoma. The company specializes in short-term consumer lending with a focus on speed and accessibility for people facing immediate financial needs. Their Oklahoma City location at 9300 N. May Ave. has been serving the local community with installment loans and related money services.

Advance America's primary product is installment loans ranging from $100 to $1,820, available both online and in-store. These loans are positioned as an alternative to payday loans, offering higher loan amounts with extended repayment terms. The company also offers Western Union services at their physical locations. Customers can apply online, by phone pre-qualification, or in-person at any store location. The application process requires government-issued ID, proof of income, a checking account, and Social Security Number or ITIN.

The Oklahoma City location distinguishes itself through bilingual customer service ("Hablamos español"), extended weekday hours (10 AM–6 PM Monday-Friday, 10 AM–1 PM Saturday), and positive customer reviews highlighting staff professionalism and quick processing. The store is conveniently located in a strip mall at the corner of N. May Ave and Croydon Ct with nearby retail stores and restaurants. Advance America operates a referral reward program offering $50 for each successful customer referral.

While Advance America offers genuine convenience and same-day funding for emergency situations, borrowers should recognize that installment loans, despite being marketed as improvements over payday loans, still carry high costs typical of short-term lending products. The maximum loan amount of $1,820 limits usefulness for larger financial emergencies. Interest rates and total cost of borrowing are not disclosed on the website, preventing full transparency assessment. Customers should carefully review loan terms before committing and consider whether alternatives might better serve their financial situation.
address: 4702 N Western Ave, Oklahoma City, OK 73118

company_info.headquarters: 4702 N Western Ave, Oklahoma City, OK 73118

pros: Same-day personal loans up to $1,820 available online or in-store with quick approval
Bilingual customer service offered in Spanish ("Hablamos español")
Extended weekday hours (10 AM–6 PM) plus Saturday availability (10 AM–1 PM)
Convenient strip mall location accessible from multiple roads (N. May Ave and Croydon Ct)
4.9 out of 5 star rating based on 125,679 customer reviews with specific positive feedback about staff and speed
Online application option allows pre-qualification by phone before visiting the store
Referral reward program offering $50 per successful customer referral
Western Union money transfer services available at the location
cons: Interest rates and total cost of borrowing not disclosed on website, preventing transparent cost comparison
Maximum loan amount of $1,820 may be insufficient for many financial emergencies beyond basic needs
Installment loans, while marketed as better than payday loans, still represent high-cost short-term borrowing with APRs typical of this product category
In-person application requires multiple documents and a checking account, creating barriers for unbanked consumers
Limited to $100–$1,820 range offers minimal flexibility for borrowers needing larger amounts
best_for: Borrowers facing immediate cash needs under $1,820 who can repay within weeks or months
Spanish-speaking Oklahoma City residents requiring accessible, bilingual financial services
Consumers who prefer in-person application with same-day funding over online-only lenders
People with a checking account and stable income documentation seeking faster alternatives to traditional bank loans
diagnosis: Advance America is best for Oklahoma City residents facing immediate cash needs under $2,000 who can access a physical location and have a checking account and income documentation. The main caveat is that while same-day funding is convenient, borrowers should recognize this is high-cost short-term lending and carefully review total cost before borrowing—the website does not transparently disclose interest rates or APR, making it impossible to assess true affordability.
services: Phone pre-qualification for loans before store visit
Bilingual customer service in English and Spanish
Customer referral reward program ($50 per referral)
In-person financial counseling to select appropriate loan product
